nodes.label: ECO AVANT Technology
nodes.rationale: Allows total detergent usage by machine while reducing water and energy consumption. Requires initial activation with 2L water in main wash compartment. Must be re-activated after emergency drain via tubicino.

nodes.label: Anti-Crease Feature (Anti Piega)
nodes.rationale: Blocks last rinse drain for synthetics/delicates to prevent creases when laundry stays in machine. Drain by pressing same button or selecting Program G.

nodes.label: Half-Load Feature (Mezzo carico)
nodes.rationale: For reduced cotton load (max 2.5 kg). Machine does 3 rinses instead of 4 to save water.

nodes.label: Spin Exclusion (Esclusione centrifuga)
nodes.rationale: Excludes all spin phases in cotton/linen programs. Use for fabrics prone to creasing.

nodes.label: Child Safety
nodes.rationale: Packaging materials (film, polystyrene) are suffocation hazard. Always check drum before loading. When disposing: cut power cord and make door lock unusable.

nodes.label: Electrical Safety (Grounding)
nodes.rationale: Must connect to grounded outlet. Manufacturer disclaims liability for damage/injury from missing ground. Power cord must be accessible after installation.

nodes.label: Laundry Sorting Principles
nodes.rationale: Separate whites, colors, synthetics, delicates, wool. New colored laundry may bleed first wash. Remove metal objects. Button pillowcases, close zippers. Group small items in cloth bag.

nodes.label: Stain Removal Techniques
nodes.rationale: Pretreat difficult stains before wash: blood with cold water, oil paint with detergent benzine, rust with oxalic salt, mold with bleach (whites only), grass with diluted bleach, biro/acetone (not on synthetics).

nodes.label: Detergent Dosing Principles
nodes.rationale: Dose depends on: fabric type, load size, soil level, water hardness. Use less detergent for small loads, light soil, soft water, or excess foam. Adjust to water hardness levels (1-4, dolce to molto dura).

nodes.label: Water Hardness Classification
nodes.rationale: 4 levels: Level 1 dolce (0-7Â°dH/0-15Â°T.H.), Level 2 media (8-14Â°dH/16-25Â°T.H.), Level 3 dura (15-21Â°dH/26-37Â°T.H.), Level 4 molto dura (>21Â°dH/>37Â°T.H.). Information from water utility.
